channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Exclusive | Iranian Strike on U.S. Embassy Caused More Damage Than Disclosed  WSJ

  3. The United States Should Retaliate Against Iranian Embassies  American Enterprise Institute - AEI
  4. Did US Embassy in Saudi downplay damage from Iranian drone attack? Report reveals shocking details  WION
  5. U.S. Riyadh Embassy suffered "extensive" damage in Iranian drone strike  Investing.com

item.title: Big tech's next move is to put data centers in space. Can it work? - NPR
item.description:
1. Big tech's next move is to put data centers in space. Can it work?  NPR
  2. Google CEO Sundar Pichai says we’re just a decade away from a new normal of extraterrestrial data centers  Fortune
  3. Musk wants SpaceX IPO to fund AI space data centers. Microsoft's undersea setback sounds warning.  Reuters
  4. Scientists question why anyone would put data centers in space—a big bet for tech leaders like Elon Musk  Business Insider
  5. Four things we’d need to put data centers in space  MIT Technology Review

item.title: Gucci Mane Held at Gunpoint, Prompting 2 Rappers’ Arrests - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Gucci Mane Held at Gunpoint, Prompting 2 Rappers’ Arrests  The New York Times

  5. Pooh Shiesty’s father, Big30 face robbery, kidnapping charges in court  WREG.com

item.title: No One at Waffle House Remembers FEMA Official Who Says He Teleported In - The New York Times
item.description:
1. No One at Waffle House Remembers FEMA Official Who Says He Teleported In  The New York Times

  4. Trump official claims Truth Social blocking his posts on teleporting to Waffle House  The Independent

item.title: To reach the Final Four, Illinois needed to think outside the box. And country. - NBC News
item.description:
1. To reach the Final Four, Illinois needed to think outside the box. And country.  NBC News

item.title: Some Marines graduate without their parents' presence amid ICE fears - NBC News
item.description:
1. Some Marines graduate without their parents' presence amid ICE fears  NBC News
